title: PagerDuty provider config
description: Configuration shape for a PagerDuty Events API v2 integration. Requires monitoring_paging entitlement (Medium+).

routing_key.description: PagerDuty Events API v2 integration routing key. 32-character hex string. Encrypted at rest. Sent in the payload body (not header).

service_id.description: Optional PagerDuty service ID (7-char alphanumeric). Used for cross-reference in the SDUI + for API-level operations like escalation policy lookup.

escalation_policy_id.description: Optional PagerDuty escalation policy ID. When set, the driver includes it in the payload for policy-based routing.

client.description: 'client' field in PagerDuty payload. Identifies the source system.

client_url.description: Optional URL back to the incident in the tenant's Stackra dashboard. PagerDuty renders this as a link in the incident view.

auto_resolve_on_signal_clear.description: true = when the monitoring alert resolves, dispatch a PagerDuty 'resolve' event with the same dedup_key. false = leave PagerDuty incidents to manual resolution.

dedup_key_prefix.description: Optional prefix for the dedup_key. Alerts on the same policy dedupe via dedup_key = prefix + policy_id.
